data.title: Clairvest successfully sells F12.net with majority investment from private equity firm, existing shareholders reinvest.
data.description: Today, Clairvest Group Inc. (TSX: CVG) disclosed the sale of its interests in F12.net. The sale, conducted alongside Clairvest Equity Partners VI, involved a majority investment from a prominent middle-market private equity firm and significant equity reinvestment from current F12 shareholders and the executive team, led by Founder & CEO Alex Webb. This move marks an important development in the company's journey, showcasing a shift in ownership and strategic direction.

data.title: Qualstar Corporation will reincorporate in Nevada and implement a 3:1 split of Common Stock.
data.description: The plan involves a 3-for-1 split of the Company's common stock. This means that for every one share an investor currently holds, they will receive three additional shares. This move is aimed at increasing liquidity and making the stock more accessible to a wider range of investors. It also signifies a potential growth in investor interest and confidence in the company's performance, with the hope of driving the stock price up gradually. Such a split can often result in a temporary decrease in the stock price post-split before potentially rising as market forces adjust to the new number of outstanding shares.

data.title: Geron Corp reveals strategic plan for long-term value creation through restructuring. #finance #news
data.description: A recent study reveals that approximately 30% of households in the United States have reported experiencing food insecurity in the past year. This equates to around 40 million households struggling to access adequate food. The research further found that this issue has been exacerbated by the COVID-19 pandemic, with around 54 million Americans, including 18 million children, facing food insecurity in 2020. This represents a significant increase compared to previous years. The study also highlights disparities among racial and ethnic groups, with Black and Hispanic households being disproportionately affected. Efforts to address this crisis include increased funding for food assistance programs and community initiatives.

data.title: zSpace, Inc. undergoes strategic restructuring for financial stability with focus on AR learning solutions. Commitment to innovation in STEM/CTE programs.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, zSpace, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZSPC) headquartered in San Jose, California, revealed the successful finalization of an extensive strategic restructuring aimed at improving its cost efficiency and operational effectiveness. This restructuring is intended to prepare the company for enduring success in the future by adjusting to changing market conditions. zSpace is renowned globally for its immersive augmented reality (AR) learning solutions for educational purposes. The company remains dedicated to providing innovative augmented and virtual reality (AR/VR) experiences that support progress in STEM, CTE, and career readiness programs.

data.title: Branded Legacy, Inc. undergoes management overhaul with new leader Dr. Jamie Forrest after acquisition of controlling interest.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, it was announced today, December 10, 2025, that Branded Legacy, Inc. (OTC: BLEG) has undergone a significant transformation and change in ownership. Dr. Jamie Forrest, PhD, MPH, a shareholder, has acquired the controlling stake leading to this restructuring.

data.title: Dynatrace introduces Dynatrace Intelligence at Perform conference, aiming to enhance observability with agentic automation.
data.description: In Las Vegas, Dynatrace (NYSE: DT) introduced Dynatrace Intelligence at its annual user conference, Perform. The new agentic operations system merges deterministic and agentic AI, providing customers with reliable AI-powered observability. Dynatrace Intelligence is designed to monitor and enhance dynamic AI workloads, enabling organizations to create more robust applications and enhance customer experience.
The Fed has not yet complied with subpoenas as Powell probe continues - CNBC, citing source.

data.title: AutoManager, backed by Beekman Group, acquires Macrosmith for digital document management in auto dealerships. Terms not disclosed.
data.description: AutoManager, a top provider of dealer management software to independent automotive and RV dealerships, recently acquired Macrosmith, a company specializing in document management software for automotive retailers. The transaction, part of AutoManager's goal to offer a complete software solution, was finalized without revealing the financial details. Owned by The Beekman Group, AutoManager continues to expand its portfolio and enhance its service offerings within the industry.

data.title: Dynatrace unveils improved Real User Monitoring at Perform conference, providing unified insights for modern applications.
data.description: In Las Vegas, at the Perform conference, Dynatrace (NYSE: DT) unveiled new Real User Monitoring (RUM) features that provide comprehensive insights for modern web and mobile applications. RUM is crucial for assessing real user experience, especially with the transition to dynamic, cloud-native, and AI-driven architectures. The announcement highlighted the importance of RUM in understanding application performance in the era of LLM-powered services.

data.title: Planar launches new Simplicity E Series with wireless connectivity for digital signage, expanding options for 4K displays.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, Planar revealed the new Planar® Simplicity™ E Series as an expansion of its well-received Simplicity™ Series. These large format 4K LCD displays offer wireless connectivity and reliable performance for crucial digital signage applications like advertising, wayfinding, menu boards, presentations, and emergency messaging. The E Series is designed to facilitate easy wireless connectivity, making it an ideal choice for various businesses. This new line provides enhanced features to cater to the needs of modern digital signage, ensuring seamless performance in a range of commercial settings.

data.title: Behaviour Interactive appoints Stephanie Marchand as COO and Nathan Sellyn as Deputy CEO in Montreal.
data.description: Montreal-based company Behaviour Interactive has recently appointed Stephanie Marchand as its new Chief Operating Officer, and Nathan Sellyn as the Deputy Chief Executive Officer. This strategic move aims to strengthen the leadership within the organization as they look to drive growth and innovation in their operations. The company is known for its expertise in the interactive entertainment sector and these appointments mark important milestones in its leadership structure.

data.title: India's Buy Now Pay Later market to grow by 22.5% to $30.45 billion by 2026, featuring companies like OlaMoney Postpaid and Flipkart Pay Later.
data.description: A recent report has been released on the India Buy Now Pay Later sector, available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The BNPL market in India is projected to increase by 22.5% annually, reaching a total of US$30.45 billion by 2026. The period from 2022 to 2025 witnessed significant growth in the buy now pay later market within the country. This databook provides detailed insights with over 90 key performance indicators on market size, end-use sectors, market share, product analysis, business model, and demographics.

data.title: Geronimo Power proposes data center and power generation in Nobles County, Minnesota, well-received by community. (Numbers not provided)
data.description: The community in Minneapolis showed great enthusiasm during open house events for the proposed data center and dedicated power generation at Powered Data Park. Geronimo Power recently unveiled their new office in Worthington, Minnesota, attracting community members and residents to learn more about the project. This initiative aims to offer advanced technology with robust power generation capabilities. The open houses provided an opportunity for stakeholders to engage with the project, discussing potential economic benefits and the significant impact of the data center. Attendees were impressed with the proposed features, emphasizing the positive prospects for the region's technological advancement.

data.title: WellCare of Kentucky and Centene Foundation donate $145,000 to food pantries in Kentucky to tackle food insecurity.
data.description: A recent announcement from WellCare of Kentucky and Centene Foundation highlighted a collaboration to bolster community food resources for families facing challenges in obtaining nutritious meals. This initiative comes at a crucial time to address the pressing need for accessible healthy food options. The philanthropic arm of Centene Corporation, Centene Foundation, has joined hands with WellCare of Kentucky to implement strategic measures. The aim is to support families in need by increasing the availability of food resources. This partnership signals a significant step forward in providing assistance to those grappling with food insecurity.

data.title: Fed monitors economy with stable elevated inflation and robust job market, likely maintaining current interest rates.
data.description: Inflation remains high yet stable, and the employment sector is robust, prompting economists to project that the Federal Reserve will maintain interest rates at their current level.

data.title: TotalEnergies to supply 800 GWh renewable electricity to SWM's French paper plants over 10 years starting in 2026.
data.description: TotalEnergies and SWM have signed a contract for the supply of renewable electricity to SWM’s three plants in France starting from January 2026. The agreement will last for 10 years and cover a total volume of 800 GWh. This Clean Firm Power contract ensures a constant delivery profile for the electricity supplied by TotalEnergies to SWM's facilities, which include Papeteries de Saint Girons, PDM Industries, and LTR Industries. The project involves TotalEnergies providing sustainable energy to these plants for a significant period, benefitting both companies and contributing to their renewable energy goals.

data.title: Papa Johns introduces new Pan Pizza with crispy edges, airy center, and six-cheese blend. Reimagined after a decade.
data.description: In Atlanta, Papa Johns is introducing a revamped Pan Pizza nationwide starting January 29th. The new pan pizza features crispy caramelized edges, a soft center, and a six-cheese blend. This updated version aims to elevate the nostalgic favorite to provide a rich and satisfying experience. This reintroduction comes after nearly ten years of culinary development.

data.title: Natus launches latest Natus Elite EMG software with AVEMG innovation, maintaining familiarity and reliability for customers.
data.description: Natus Medical Incorporated, based in Middleton, Wisconsin, revealed on January 28, 2026, the rollout of the latest edition of the Natus Elite EMG software, a prominent software in the industry. This recent release maintains the expected familiarity and dependability for customers and introduces Augmented Visual technology.
